projects.name: Generative AI Usage & Governance
projects.description: Analyzed Cisco Umbrella DNS and security reports to establish baseline Generative AI usage, identify unique users, and rank top AI tools. Created governance-focused presentations highlighting approved tools, acceptable use, monitoring controls, and data exposure risks.

projects.name: Enterprise SOC Detection & Incident Response Platform
projects.description: Developed a full SOC-style monitoring and incident response environment using Splunk, Suricata, Zeek, Sysmon, and Python to simulate enterprise threat detection, automate alerts, analyze logs, and streamline security incident response workflows for real-time protection.

projects.name: Phishing Triage
projects.description: Automated phishing email analysis and triage tool built with Python for rapid classification, threat indicator extraction, and incident response workflow integration.

projects.name: EncryPC
projects.description: Encryption utility built in Python for secure file and data encryption, implementing modern cryptographic algorithms for data protection and confidentiality.

projects.name: TheHarvester - OSINT Tool
projects.description: Open-source intelligence gathering tool for collecting emails, subdomains, hosts, and other data from public sources to support reconnaissance and security assessments.

projects.name: Spring Boot JWT Security
projects.description: Secure authentication and authorization system using Spring Boot 3 and JSON Web Tokens (JWT) for implementing role-based access control in enterprise applications.
